rankings.reason: Provides the most comprehensive, structured guide and actionable advice tailored to the influencer persona and traveler needs.
Good structure and helpful local tips, but lacks the specific 'mistakes to avoid' section requested in the prompt.
Follows the structure well but is overly simplistic and lacks the professional depth expected for a travel influencer.
Fails to provide a complete step-by-step guide from arrival to boarding and ignores the requested two-part format.
